reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza!!! Los plateros iban atendiendo a los que se les antojaba. Sólo 3 autos antes que yo y tardaron 40 minutos en atenderme. En las otras islas atendían al que llegaba y dejaban de lado a los que ya estábamos esperando. Para los que viajan desde Nqn hacia Zapala, les conviene cargar en Plaza Huincul.

(Translated by Google)
A disgrace! The gas station attendants were serving whoever they felt like. There were only three cars ahead of me, and it took them 40 minutes to serve me. At the other stations, they were serving whoever arrived first and ignoring those of us who were already waiting. For those traveling from Neuquén to Zapala, it's better to fill up in Plaza Huincul.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR3dkttR29BRRAB
